'''Mon Bala''' was the innermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] orbiting the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Ryloth (star)/Legends|Ryloth]] in the [[Ryloth system/Legends|Ryloth system]]. Located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], it was a molten rock.

{{Planet-stub}}
